title: AN ACT TO AMEND SECTION EIGHTY-TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWO HUNDRED NINETY-SIX, AS AMENDED.

chunks.text:
H. No. 15476 / 62 OG No. 50, 9409 (December 12, 1966)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4533, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND SECTION EIGHTY-TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWO HUNDRED NINETY-SIX, AS AMENDED.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
